articles.title: Bruins reportedly trade for Utah forward JJ Peterka
articles.description:
Peterka, 24, has hit 50 points in two of his four full seasons in the NHL.

The post Bruins reportedly trade for Utah forward JJ Peterka appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins acquire forward JJ Peterka from Utah Mammoth in a trade.
Peterka, 24, has scored 50 points in two of his four NHL seasons.
This trade aims to strengthen the Bruins' offense for the upcoming season.

articles.title: As Mass. ballot initiatives multiply, critics want to limit them
articles.description:
Voters have passed several major laws by initiative in past elections. A 2016 initiative legalized marijuana, and a 2022 initiative created a tax on millionaires.

The post As Mass. ballot initiatives multiply, critics want to limit them appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts voters passed significant laws via ballot initiatives, including marijuana legalization in 2016.
In 2022, a millionaire tax initiative was approved, affecting high-income residents.
Critics propose limiting initiatives to reduce potential voter confusion and streamline legislation.

articles.title: Craig Breslow on his job security, whether the Red Sox will buy or sell, and more
articles.description:
Breslow faced some tough questions about the state of the team and his role in what has transpired this season during a recent radio interview.

The post Craig Breslow on his job security, whether the Red Sox will buy or sell, and more appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Craig Breslow addressed his job security during a recent radio interview on June 26.
Breslow discussed potential trades, indicating the Red Sox may buy or sell players soon.
Boston residents may see roster changes impacting the team's performance this season.
